title: Senior Doctor - LV Prasad Eye Institute Capital India - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - LV Prasad Eye Institute Capital India - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? LV Prasad Eye Institute Capital India in Howrah offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About LV Prasad Eye Institute Capital India:
LV Prasad Eye Institute Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LV Prasad Eye Institute Capital India!
